summary: Retested Add Staff flow on /more after formatApiErrorDetail() fix. Happy path (valid email + 10-char password) works: modal closes, 'QA Staff' appears in staff-list, NO 'Objects are not valid as a React child' crash. Invalid-password path did not trigger backend 422 because native HTML5 minLength validation blocked submit — modal stayed open, no React crash, but data-testid='staff-error' was not rendered (path not reachable via UI with too-short password). WhatsApp/Remind anchors still render on /payments for overdue wholesalers (2 found).
passed: /more → Staff tab → Add Staff modal opens
Happy path save: modal closes, new staff 'QA Staff' appended to staff-list
No React 'Objects are not valid as a React child' error at any point
/payments regression: WhatsApp/Remind reminder anchors present for overdue rows (2)

failed.issue: Submitting with password '12' does NOT reach saveStaff handler because the password input's native HTML5 minLength (6) blocks form submission. As a result, data-testid='staff-error' never renders. The formatApiErrorDetail() fix cannot be UI-verified through this path.
failed.evidence: After clicking save-staff-btn with password='12', modal remained open (name input count=1) and staff-error element count=0. No network 422 was triggered.

action_items: Optional: to explicitly verify staff-error rendering for backend 422s, bypass native validation (e.g. remove minLength on password field or trigger a duplicate-email error) so the formatted error message path can be exercised in the UI. Not a blocker for the reported crash fix — the crash regression is confirmed resolved.
